Advanced Q4 Tactics To Use In 2019
Nuggets of Wisdom from the Coaches
Q4 is one of the best and craziest times of the year for us Facebook marketers.
CPMs start to skyrocket as advertisers start to dump their dollars in preparation for
Christmas sales.
For many - especially in eCommerce - it's the make or break period of the whole year.
For others, they experience a slow down in sales activity- common in many B2B
companies.
The point is regardless of the nature of your client campaigns will be affected by Q4.
Are you ready for it?
Probably not, but do not despair! We got your back!
Because with the help of Madis Birk we'll get you Q4 ready!
Especially since this year's Q4 will be particularly interesting on the back of Facebook's
move to CBO as the default. In Q4 budget allocation is anyway a big topic, but this year
it's even bigger. You need to not only prepare your business for Q4, but also for CBO
as the default. You're getting hit with 2 in 1 this year.
In this video Madis covers:
Different phases of Q4
How to decide what strategy to use in Q4
Budget allocation for Q4
What to account for in the context of CBO
Advanced Q4 tactics to use in 2019?
PDF Presentation Can Be Accessed HERE
